items.caption: A "private property, no trespassing" sign prominently displayed at a railroad crossing. the sign is mounted on a pole and clearly states the rules for the area. the background shows a set of railroad tracks with a lush green forest in the distance, indicating that the location is likely in a rural or semi-rural area. the sign serves as a warning to passersby that they are entering private property and are not allowed to trespass on the tracks.
